revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:安福寺]]
'''Anfuku-ji''' (安福寺, あんふくじ, あんぷくじ) == Temples == * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Tsukuba)|ja|安福寺 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Tsukuba)|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Tsukuba)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134810609}} - Located in [[:en:Tsukuba City|Tsukuba City]], {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}, affiliated with the [[:en:Shingon-shu Buzan-ha|Shingon-shu Buzan-ha]]. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Inashiki)|ja|安福寺 (稲敷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Inashiki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500961|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Inashiki)}} - Located in [[Inashiki City]], Ibaraki Prefecture, affiliated with the [[Tendai School]]<ref name="tendai">{{Cite web|url=http://www.tendai.or.jp/tera/kensaku.php?action=execute&title=%E5%AE%89%E7%A6%8F%E5%AF%BA&title_kana=&post_code=&pref=&address=&area= |title=Database of Tendai Sect Temples |publisher=Tendai Sect |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Hokota)|ja|安福寺 (鉾田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Hokota)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500964|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Hokota)}} - Located in [[Hokota City]], Ibaraki Prefecture, affiliated with the Tendai School<ref name="tendai"/>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kounosu)|ja|安福寺 (鴻巣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Kounosu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500967|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Kounosu)}} - Located in [[Kounosu City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, affiliated with the [[:en:Soto Zen|Soto Zen]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sotozen-navi.com/detail/index_110157.html |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Soto Zen Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Katsushika)|ja|安福寺 (葛飾区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Katsushika)|1=Anpuku-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97206655}} - Located in [[Katsushika Ward]], {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, affiliated with the Shingon-shu Buzan-ha. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Itoigawa)|ja|安福寺 (糸魚川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Itoigawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500971|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Itoigawa)}} - Located in [[Itoigawa City]], {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}, affiliated with Soto Zen<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sotozen-navi.com/detail/index_150674.html |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Soto Zen Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kofu)|ja|安福寺 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Kofu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500975|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Kofu)}} - Located in [[Kofu City]], {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}, affiliated with Soto Zen<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sotozen-navi.com/detail/index_190164.html |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Soto Zen Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Hokuto)|ja|安福寺 (北杜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Hokuto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500979|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Hokuto)}} - Located in [[Hokuto City]], Yamanashi Prefecture, affiliated with Soto Zen<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sotozen-navi.com/detail/index_190558.html |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Soto Zen Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Gifu)|ja|安福寺 (岐阜県養老町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Gifu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500983|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Gifu)}} - Located in [[Yoro Town]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}, affiliated with [[Jodo Shinshu Otani-ha]]. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Toyota)|ja|安福寺 (豊田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Toyota)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500987|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Toyota)}} - Located in [[:en:Toyota City|Toyota City]], {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, affiliated with Jodo Shinshu Otani-ha<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.okazaki-kyoku.net/search/jiin_detail.cgi?id=356 |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Jodo Shinshu Otani-ha Okazaki Diocese |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Higashiomi)|ja|安福寺 (東近江市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Higashiomi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500992|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Higashiomi)}} - Located in [[Higashiomi City]], {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, affiliated with [[:en:Jodo Shu|Jodo Shu]]. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kizugawa)|ja|安福寺 (木津川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Kizugawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500994|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Kizugawa)}} - Located in [[Kizugawa City]], {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, affiliated with [[Nishiyama Jodo School]]. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kishiwada)|ja|安福寺 (岸和田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Kishiwada)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500998|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Kishiwada)}} - Located in [[Kishiwada City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, affiliated with Jodo Shu<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://otera.jodo.or.jp/temple/32-419/ |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Jodo Shu Temple Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kashiwara)|ja|安福寺 (柏原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Kashiwara)|qq=}} - Located in [[Kashiwara City]], Osaka Prefecture, affiliated with Jodo Shu<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://otera.jodo.or.jp/temple/32-317/ |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Jodo Shu Temple Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Himeji)|ja|安福寺 (姫路市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Himeji)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135501001|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Himeji)}} - Located in [[Himeji City]], {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, affiliated with [[Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://hongwanji-kobe.jp/search/detail.php?id=366 |title=Anfuku-ji (Shinki Sect) |publisher=Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha Kobe Diocese |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kinokawa)|ja|安福寺 (紀の川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Kinokawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135501005|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Kinokawa)}} - Located in [[Kinokawa City]], {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}, affiliated with [[:en:Koyasan Shingon-shu|Koyasan Shingon-shu]]. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kotoura)|ja|安福寺 (鳥取県琴浦町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Kotoura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135501008|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Kotoura)}} - Located in [[Kotoura Town]], {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|qid=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture|1=Tottori Prefecture}}, affiliated with Soto Zen<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sotozen-navi.com/detail/index_310120.html |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Soto Zen Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Fuchu)|ja|安福寺 (広島県府中市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Fuchu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135501011|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Fuchu)}} - Located in [[Fuchu City]], {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|qid=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}, affiliated with Soto Zen<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sotozen-navi.com/detail/index_340136.html |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Soto Zen Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Saga)|ja|安福寺 (佐賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Saga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135501014|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Saga)}} - Located in [[:en:Saga City|Saga City]], {{ill|Saga Prefecture|en|Saga Prefecture|qid=Q160420|lt=Saga Prefecture|1=Saga Prefecture}}, affiliated with Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://bingo.gr.jp/i/cgi-bin/nph-jiin.cgi?t=801536 |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha Bingo Diocese |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Shiroishi)|ja|安福寺 (佐賀県白石町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Shiroishi)|1=Anpuku-ji Temple (Shiroishi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q131286008}} - Located in [[Shiroishi Town]], {{ill|Saga Prefecture|en|Saga Prefecture|qid=Q160420|lt=Saga Prefecture|1=Saga Prefecture}}, affiliated with the Tendai School (Suido Anfuku-ji)<ref name="tendai"/>. * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Usa)|ja|安福寺 (宇佐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji (Usa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135501018|1=Anfuku-ji Temple (Usa)}} - Located in [[Usa City]], [[:en:Oita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], affiliated with Soto Zen<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://sotozen-navi.com/detail/index_440148.html |title=Anfuku-ji |publisher=Soto Zen Navi |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. == Other == * {{ill|Anfuku-ji Yokoana Group|ja|安福寺横穴群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfuku-ji Yokoana Group|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安福寺 (柏原市)|1=Anfuku-ji (Kashiwara)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11451150}} - Located in Kashiwara City, Osaka Prefecture, a historical site<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.city.kashiwara.osaka.jp/docs/2016091100039/?doc_id=5362 |title=Anfuku-ji Yokoana Group |publisher=Kashiwara City |date=2017-02-07 |accessdate=2020-05-28|qq=}}</ref>. == References == {{Reflist|2|qq=}} {{disambiguation}} {{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|安福寺|version=102476247|comment=Imported full ja history}}
